sponsor.name: Stewmac

hero.caption: For All Your Guitar Repair and Construction Needs !
hero.title: Stewart MacDonald

sponsor.about:
StewMac (Stewart-MacDonald) is a well-known supplier of tools, parts, and materials primarily for guitar and instrument builders, luthiers, and repair technicians. They offer a wide range of products, including hardware (bridges, tuners, pickups), woodworking tools, finishing supplies, and specialized kits for guitar maintenance and customization.

Founded in 1968, StewMac is a trusted resource for both professionals and hobbyists, providing high-quality components, detailed tutorials, and technical support. They’re especially popular among those who build or repair electric and acoustic guitars, basses, and other stringed instruments.
